name: ghetto
description: ```ehh shooter ehh shooter ├── package.json    # Node dependencies (express, socket.io) ├── shared/         # Code used by BOTH server and client │ └── constants.js  # Map dimensions, player speed, bullet speed, fire rate ├── server/         # The Authoritative Backend │ ├── server.js     # Entry point: Express app and Socket.io setup │ ├── game.js       # The main game loop: updates positions, checks collisions │ ├── player.js     # Player data structure (x, y, score, health/stun state) │ └── projectile.js # Bullet data structure and trajectory math └── public/         # The Client-side (served to the browser) ├── index.html      # The DOM structure (menus, scoreboards, game arena) ├── css/ │ └── style.css     # UI styling and absolute positioning for game entities └── js/ ├── main.js         # The requestAnimationFrame loop and Socket listeners ├── input.js        # Tracks KeyDown/KeyUp and Mouse clicks/position ├── state.js        # Stores the latest snapshot of the game sent by the server └── render.js       # Purely updates DOM `transform: translate()` based on state.js ```
